# arifOS Knowledge Index

This file provides a map to the core documentation governing this organism.

## Protocol Standards
- [MCP Specification](/docs/knowledge/mcp_llms.txt) — Official Model Context Protocol definition.
- [FastMCP Implementation](/docs/knowledge/fastmcp_llms.txt) — Python-specific FastMCP documentation.

## Organ Contexts
- [/organs/geox/llms.txt](/organs/geox/llms.txt) — Geoscience intelligence capabilities. (Create if missing)
- [/organs/wealth/llms.txt](/organs/wealth/llms.txt) — Capital intelligence capabilities.

## Usage Rule
All agents working within this VPS must refer to these knowledge sources before implementing or modifying MCP tools to ensure strict adherence to the arifOS Horizon architecture.

*DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI — 999 SEAL ALIVE*
